_.$description: Tabs tab link border radius (default appearance).

minimal.$description: Tabs tab link border radius (minimal appearance).

_.$description: Tabs container bottom border width (default appearance).

selected.$description: Tabs current (selected) tab bottom border width — the active-tab underline (default appearance).

focus.$description: Tabs tab link background color on focus (default appearance).

hover.$description: Tabs tab link background color on hover (default appearance).

_.$description: Tabs container bottom border color (default appearance).

selected.$description: Tabs current (selected) tab bottom border color — the active-tab underline (default appearance).

disabled.$description: Tabs tab link text color when disabled.

focus.$description: Tabs tab link text color on focus (default appearance).

hover.$description: Tabs tab link text color on hover (minimal appearance).

selected.$description: Tabs current (selected) tab link text color.

_.$description: Tabs tab link font size (default appearance).

minimal.$description: Tabs tab link font size (minimal appearance).

_.$description: Tabs tab link font weight (default appearance).

minimal.$description: Tabs tab link font weight (minimal appearance).

_.$description: Tabs tab link line height (default appearance).

minimal.$description: Tabs tab link line height (minimal appearance).

padding.$description: Tabs tab link inner padding (default appearance).
